properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 103/19

BARENTS SEA
HYDROGRAPHIC SURVEY WILL BE CARRIED OUT FROM 21 SEP TO 09 OCT BY RESEARCH VESSEL POURQUOI PAS CS FMCF,
TOWING 1000 METERS LONG CABLE IN THE AREA DELIMITED BY THE FOLLOWING POSITIONS:

 A. 76-50,0N-014-08,0E

B. 76-35,0N-013-10,0E

C. 76-04,0N-014-08,0E

D. 76-25,0N-015-55,0E


SUBSEA SCIENTIFIC MOORINGS WILL ALSO BE DEPLOYED
WIDE BERTH FROM AREA REQUESTED NAVAREA XIX 103/19

BARENTS SEA
HYDROGRAPHIC SURVEY WILL BE CARRIED OUT FROM 21 SEP TO 09 OCT BY RESEARCH VESSEL POURQUOI PAS CS FMCF,
TOWING 1000 METERS LONG CABLE IN THE AREA DELIMITED BY THE FOLLOWING POSITIONS:

 A. 76-50,0N-014-08,0E

B. 76-35,0N-013-10,0E

C. 76-04,0N-014-08,0E

D. 76-25,0N-015-55,0E


SUBSEA SCIENTIFIC MOORINGS WILL ALSO BE DEPLOYED

WIDE BERTH FROM AREA REQUESTED
LAST HF MESSAGE 84/19
